json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete a total of nine courses (36 units) selected from the following groups. At least four courses (16 units) must be from Labor Studies. The remaining five courses (20 units) may be selected from Labor Studies or the following additional electives.
courses: LBR STD 101 - Introduction to Labor and Social Movements in Los Angeles
